title: ammothamnus gibbosus
intro: Ammothamnus gibbosus, also known as rockrose or sweet-briar, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Ammothamnus gibbosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
